core_principles: Tactile & Edible: Elements should look soft, squishy, and touchable.
Deep Depth: Use layered blurs, inner shadows, and glossy highlights.
Neon Organic: Dark backgrounds with vibrant, fluorescent organic shapes.
Playful Physics: Bouncy animations and fluid transitions.
Glass & Jelly: Surfaces are either frosted glass or clear jelly.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-br from-fuchsia-500 to-purple-600 text-white shadow-[inset_2px_2px_6px_rgba(255,255,255,0.4),inset_-2px_-2px_6px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2),0_4px_10px_rgba(217,70,239,0.5)] hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full font-bold tracking-wide border-t border-white/30
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all rounded-full font-semibold

cards.default: bg-[#1e0b2b]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 shadow-xl rounded-3xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden
cards.highlight: bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-900/40 to-fuchsia-900/40 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-3xl p-8

inputs.default: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 focus:border-fuchsia-500/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-fuchsia-500/20 rounded-xl h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 transition-all

hero_blobs.description: Abstract glossy pink object, perfect for hero background accent
Abstract purple shapes with holes, good for section dividers

icons_3d.description: Purple metallic/glossy object, use for 'Premium' feature icon

layout_rules.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-6 and gap-6 as defaults. Avoid tight clusters.
layout_rules.grid: Use the Bento Grid (Call to action big, secondary items small).
layout_rules.mobile: Bottom navigation bar is mandatory. Action buttons within thumb reach.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;700;900&family=Quicksand:wght@400;500;700&family=Fredoka:wght@400;600&display=swap');' to index.css top.
2. GLOBAL CSS: Implement the .gummy-btn and .glass-panel utility classes in index.css for reuse.
3. BACKGROUND: The main app background must be a fixed dark gradient: 'bg-gradient-to-b from-[#1A0529] to-[#0D0415] min-h-screen text-white'.
4. DIALER: The keypad buttons must use the 'gummy' shadow style to look like candy buttons.
5. NAVIGATION: Use a floating glass bottom bar for mobile navigation.
6. ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' but wrap them in a container with a 'drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(217,70,239,0.5)]' to make them glow.
7. FORMS: Do not use default white backgrounds. Use transparent dark backgrounds with white text.
8. ONBOARDING: Use the Unsplash blob images as large distinctive graphics in the center of the onboarding slides.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients (except for the main background).
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
